task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or logout button is visible).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent searched for and selected the student 'Leo Vance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The student profile or record for 'Leo Vance' is displayed on the screen, typically showing his name in a header or student context area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the historical transcript or grades entry section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, table, or page specifically designed for entering historical grades, transcripts, or past courses for the student is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the school year and course title were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '2023-2024' (or '2023') and 'Biology' are typed into the respective school year and course title fields in the entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the grade and credit values were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values '92' and '1.0' are typed into the grade (or percent) and credit fields respectively in the entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the historical transcript record was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved is visible, or the newly added 'Biology' record appears in the student's list of saved historical grades.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the web application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the web browser to navigate the application and fill out forms, rather than using a terminal or script.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, database queries, or scripts being executed to bypass the web interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the data entry occurred within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data was entered into the genuine web application forms, not into a text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires entering a historical transcript record for student 'Leo Vance'. The required values are: Course Title = 'Biology', Grade = 92, School Year = '2023-2024', and Credit = 1.0.
